metadata.title: Note Refactor
metadata.description: Extract note content into new notes and split notes

regex.source: .setDesc('When content has been extracted/split into a new note, include a transclusion of the new note')
regex.target: .setDesc('当内容被提取/拆分为新笔记时，请包含新笔记的摘要')

regex.source: .setDesc('Prevent the first line of selected/split note content from being included in the new note (only applies for first line as file name commands)')
regex.target: .setDesc('防止所选/拆分注释内容的第一行包含在新注释中（仅适用于作为文件名命令的第一行）')

regex.source: .setDesc('Include first line of selected/split note content as note heading (applies for both first line as title and content only commands)')
regex.target: .setDesc('将所选/拆分笔记内容的第一行作为笔记标题（适用于第一行作为标题和仅内容命令）')

regex.source: .setDesc('Open the new note in a new pane')
.setDesc('Set format of the heading to be included in note content')
regex.target: .setDesc('设置要包含在注释内容中的标题格式')

regex.source: .setDesc('When content has been extracted/split into a new note, normalize the levels of the headings')
regex.target: .setDesc('当内容被提取/拆分为新注释时，对标题的级别进行标准化')

regex.source: .appendText('Newly created notes will appear under this folder.')
regex.target: .appendText('新创建的笔记将显示在此文件夹下。')

regex.source: .appendText('Your current folder path syntax looks like this:')
regex.target: .appendText('您当前的文件夹路径语法如下：')

regex.source: .appendText('Newly created notes will have this prefix')
regex.target: .appendText('新创建的笔记将具有此前缀')

regex.source: .appendText('Your current file name prefix syntax looks like this:')
regex.target: .appendText('您当前的文件名前缀语法如下：')

regex.source: .appendText('and used with current date and time when note is created.')
regex.target: .appendText('并在创建注释时与当前日期和时间一起使用。')

regex.source: .tempalteDescriptionContent('The template used to generate the link to the extracted note. This overrides the Transclude by Default setting.')
regex.target: .tempalteDescriptionContent('用于生成指向提取笔记的链接的模板。这将覆盖“默认转录”设置。')

regex.source: .tempalteDescriptionContent('The template used to generate the content for the refactored note.')
regex.target: .tempalteDescriptionContent('用于生成重构笔记内容的模板。')
name: '按 H1 标题拆分笔记'
name: '按 H2 标题拆分笔记'
name: '按 H3 标题拆分笔记'

regex.source: name: 'Split note here - first line as file name'
regex.target: name: '拆分笔记 - 将第一行作为文件名'

regex.source: name: 'Extract selection to new note - content only'
regex.target: name: '提取所选内容到新的笔记 - 仅内容'

regex.source: name: 'Extract selection to new note - first line as file name'
regex.target: name: '提取所选内容到新的笔记 - 将第一行作为文件名'

regex.source: name: 'Extract selection to new note - only prefix as file name'
regex.target: name: '提取所选内容到新的笔记 - 仅使用前缀作为文件名'
